name: JupiterOne
description: Cyber asset analysis and governance platform providing comprehensive asset visibility, relationship mapping, compliance monitoring, and security posture management via graph-based data model

actions.name: Query Assets
actions.description: Execute a J1QL query to search and retrieve assets, entities, and their relationships

parameters.name: query
parameters.description: J1QL query string (e.g., 'FIND Host WITH publicIpAddress != undefined')

parameters.name: variables
parameters.description: Variables to pass to the query

parameters.name: cursor
parameters.description: Pagination cursor for next page of results

parameters.name: includeDeleted
parameters.description: Include recently deleted entities in results

actions.name: List Entities
actions.description: Retrieve entities of a specific type from the asset graph

parameters.name: query
parameters.description: J1QL query targeting specific entity types (e.g., 'FIND aws_instance')

actions.name: Get Entity Details
actions.description: Retrieve detailed properties and relationships for a specific entity

parameters.name: query
parameters.description: J1QL query to fetch a specific entity by key (e.g., 'FIND * WITH _key = "entity-key"')

actions.name: List Findings
actions.description: Retrieve security findings including vulnerabilities and compliance violations

parameters.name: query
parameters.description: J1QL query for findings (e.g., 'FIND Finding WITH severity = "critical"')

actions.name: List Integrations
actions.description: Retrieve configured integration instances and their sync status

actions.name: List Alert Rules
actions.description: Retrieve configured alert rules and their recent triggers

actions.name: Create Entity
actions.description: Create a new entity in the JupiterOne graph

parameters.name: mutation
parameters.description: GraphQL mutation for creating an entity

parameters.name: variables
parameters.description: Entity properties including _type, _class, displayName, and custom properties
